evidence.source_title: In All But Name: The Iranian Regime's (De Facto) Lobby in the West
evidence.description: Namazi's Atieh Bahar network and role in conceiving the NIAC lobby concept places him within the broader influence ecosystem described in the Hoover report.

editorial_notes: Indirect connection — Namazi was imprisoned in Iran from 2015-2023 and could not have participated in IEI directly.
